title: The Most Calming Teachings of Epictetus for Deep Sleep
description:
Follow Epictetus from his Roman schoolroom to an emperor's riverbank. Discover the philosophy that transforms slavery into freedom—not through breaking chains, but through mastering your mind.

✦ Master the dichotomy of control: what's truly yours
✦ Explore prohairesis: your unbreakable moral choice
✦ Find the inner citadel your mind can't abandon

Subscribe and hit 🔔 for new sleep stories every day.

Gentle narration with ambient soundscape guides you to sleep.
